evaluation_setup_mapping.description: Common evaluation setup patterns found in data

steps: If score > 1.0, assume already in 0-100 range
Round to 2 decimal places for consistency
Extract evaluation setup from source metadata when available
Apply setup-specific weights for comparison purposes
Tag scores with setup type for transparency
Prefer 0-shot scores for fair comparison when available
Map legacy benchmark names to current standard
Preserve original benchmark name in metadata
Note version differences in score entries
